title: Anchor Program Data Reader
description: Fetch and decode the on-chain state of any Anchor-based Solana program account via GoldRush — pass a program ID and account address to get fully-typed, human-readable account data with field names and values, using the program's published IDL for deserialization. No custom Borsh deserializer required. Works with any program that has a public IDL: Raydium AMM pools, Drift user accounts, Kamino lending positions, Marinade stake state. Read protocol state directly in your app or agent without a local Anchor client.
